languages.text: "Ваше Сиятельство, позвольте прямо сказать! Без всяких". {n}С лица Куравича сходит краска, на лбу вылезает сизая жилка.{/n} "Наш полк, чтобы выжить, из своих же людей штаны шил. Принято так на Заркове! Неужто пару ножей из ксеноса нельзя сделать? Или нам к этим ножам аквилы деревянные приладить, чтобы вам спалось спокойнее?"

traits.locale_text: "Ваше Сиятельство, позвольте прямо сказать! Без всяких". {n}С лица Куравича сходит краска, на лбу вылезает сизая жилка{/n}. "Наш полк, чтобы выжить, из своих же людей штаны шил. Принято так на Заркове! Неужто пару ножей из ксеноса нельзя сделать? Или нам к этим ножам аквилы деревянные приладить, чтобы вам спалось спокойнее?"

languages.text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, permission to speak freely? Without any formalities?" {n}Kuravich goes pale, while a dark vein bulges on his brow.{/n} "To survive, our regiment has to stitch trousers out of our own dead. That's how things are on Zarkov! Why can't we scrap these xenos for some knives? Or should we attach some wooden Aquilas to them just to put your mind at ease?"
languages.original_text: "Ваше Сиятельство, позвольте прямо сказать! Без всяких". {n}С лица Куравича сходит краска, на лбу вылезает сизая жилка.{/n} "Наш полк, чтобы выжить, из своих же людей штаны шил. Принято так на Заркове! Неужто пару ножей из ксеноса нельзя сделать? Или нам к этим ножам аквилы деревянные приладить, чтобы вам спалось спокойнее?"

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, permission to speak plainly! Without any formalities." {n}Kuravich goes pale, a dark vein bulging on his brow.{/n} "To survive, our regiment had to stitch trousers out of our own dead. That's how things are on Zarkov! Why can't we scrap some knives from these xenos? Or should we strap some wooden Aquilas to them just to put your mind at ease?"

Why can't we scrap some knives from these xenos? Or should we strap some wooden Aquilas to them just to put your mind at ease?"

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, permission to speak freely? Without any formalities?" {n}Kuravich goes pale, while a dark vein bulges on his brow.{/n} "To survive, our regiment has to stitch trousers out of our own dead. That's how things are on Zarkov! Why can't we scrap these xenos for some knives? Or should we attach some wooden Aquilas to them just to put your mind at ease?"

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, permission to speak freely? Without any formalities?" {n}Kuravich goes pale, while a dark vein bulges on his brow.{/n} "To survive, our regiment has to stitch trousers out of our own dead. That's how things are on Zarkov! Why can't we scrap these xenos for some knives? Or should we attach some wooden Aquilas to them just to put your mind at ease?"

languages.text: “大人，可否允许我直言不讳？不讲那些官话？”{n}库拉维奇脸色发白，额头青筋暴起。{/n}“为了活下去，我们连裤子都是拿自己人的尸体缝的。这就是扎尔科夫的活法！我们为什么不能拆了这些异形做几把刀？还是说，为了让您安心，我们得在上面钉几个木质的双头鹰标记？”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, permission to speak freely? Without any formalities?" {n}Kuravich goes pale, while a dark vein bulges on his brow.{/n} "To survive, our regiment has to stitch trousers out of our own dead. That's how things are on Zarkov! Why can't we scrap these xenos for some knives? Or should we attach some wooden Aquilas to them just to put your mind at ease?"

traits.locale_text: “大人，可否允许我直言不讳？不讲那些官话？”{n}库拉维奇脸色发白，额头青筋暴起。{/n}“为了活下去，我们连裤子都是拿自己人的尸体缝的。这就是扎尔科夫的活法！我们为什么不能拆了这些异形做几把刀？还是说，为了让您安心，我们得在上面钉几个木质的双头鹰标记？”

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, serbestçe konuşmama izin verir misiniz? Formaliteyi bir kenara bırakarak yani." {n}Sararan Kuravich'in alnında karanlık bir damar kabarıyor.{/n} "Hayatta kalmak için alayımız, kendi ölülerimizden pantolon dikmek zorunda. Zarkov'da işler böyle yürür! Neden birkaç bıçak için bu zenoları parçalayamayalım? Yoksa içinizi rahatlatmak için onlara birkaç ahşap Çift Başlı Kartal mı takmamız gerek?"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, permission to speak freely? Without any formalities?" {n}Kuravich goes pale, while a dark vein bulges on his brow.{/n} "To survive, our regiment has to stitch trousers out of our own dead. That's how things are on Zarkov! Why can't we scrap these xenos for some knives? Or should we attach some wooden Aquilas to them just to put your mind at ease?"

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, serbestçe konuşmama izin verir misiniz? Formaliteyi bir kenara bırakarak yani." {n}Sararan Kuravich'in alnında karanlık bir damar kabarıyor.{/n} "Hayatta kalmak için alayımız, kendi ölülerimizden pantolon dikmek zorunda. Zarkov'da işler böyle yürür! Neden birkaç bıçak için bu zenoları parçalayamayalım? Yoksa içinizi rahatlatmak için onlara birkaç ahşap Çift Başlı Kartal mı takmamız gerek?"

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, permission de parler librement ? Sans formalités ? » {n}Kuravich pâlit en posant cette question et une veine sombre palpite sur son front.{/n} « Pour survivre, on doit se servir de nos propres morts pour confectionner des pantalons. Ainsi va la vie sur Zarkov ! Alors, pourquoi on ne pourrait pas récupérer le métal de ces xénos pour en faire des couteaux ? Ça vous rassurerait si on collait des Aquilas en bois dessus ? »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, permission to speak freely? Without any formalities?" {n}Kuravich goes pale, while a dark vein bulges on his brow.{/n} "To survive, our regiment has to stitch trousers out of our own dead. That's how things are on Zarkov! Why can't we scrap these xenos for some knives? Or should we attach some wooden Aquilas to them just to put your mind at ease?"

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie, permission de parler librement ? Sans formalités ? » {n}Kuravich pâlit en posant cette question et une veine sombre palpite sur son front.{/n} « Pour survivre, on doit se servir de nos propres morts pour confectionner des pantalons. Ainsi va la vie sur Zarkov ! Alors, pourquoi on ne pourrait pas récupérer le métal de ces xénos pour en faire des couteaux ? Ça vous rassurerait si on collait des Aquilas en bois dessus ? »

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, ¿me permite hablar con franqueza y sin formalismos?». {n}Kuravich palidece y una vena oscura se hincha en su frente.{/n} «Para sobrevivir, el regimiento tiene que hacer hasta pantalones a partir de nuestros muertos. ¡Así se hacen las cosas en Zarkov! ¿Por qué no podemos desguazar a estos xenos para hacer cuchillos? ¿Necesita que les pongamos un Aquila de madera para estar tranquil{mf|o|a}?».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, permission to speak freely? Without any formalities?" {n}Kuravich goes pale, while a dark vein bulges on his brow.{/n} "To survive, our regiment has to stitch trousers out of our own dead. That's how things are on Zarkov! Why can't we scrap these xenos for some knives? Or should we attach some wooden Aquilas to them just to put your mind at ease?"

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, ¿me permite hablar con franqueza y sin formalismos?». {n}Kuravich palidece y una vena oscura se hincha en su frente.{/n} «Para sobrevivir, el regimiento tiene que hacer hasta pantalones a partir de nuestros muertos. ¡Así se hacen las cosas en Zarkov! ¿Por qué no podemos desguazar a estos xenos para hacer cuchillos? ¿Necesita que les pongamos un Aquila de madera para estar tranquil{mf|o|a}?».

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, darf ich offen sprechen? Ohne Formalitäten?" {n}Kuravich erblasst, aber an seiner Stirn tritt eine dunkle Ader hervor.{/n} "Um zu überleben, muss unser Regiment aus unseren eigenen Toten Hosen herstellen. So ist das auf Zarkov! Warum können wir aus diesen Xenos nicht ein paar Messer machen? Oder sollen wir ein paar hölzerne Adler an ihnen anbringen, damit Ihr ruhig schlafen könnt?"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, permission to speak freely? Without any formalities?" {n}Kuravich goes pale, while a dark vein bulges on his brow.{/n} "To survive, our regiment has to stitch trousers out of our own dead. That's how things are on Zarkov! Why can't we scrap these xenos for some knives? Or should we attach some wooden Aquilas to them just to put your mind at ease?"

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, darf ich offen sprechen? Ohne Formalitäten?" {n}Kuravich erblasst, aber an seiner Stirn tritt eine dunkle Ader hervor.{/n} "Um zu überleben, muss unser Regiment aus unseren eigenen Toten Hosen herstellen. So ist das auf Zarkov! Warum können wir aus diesen Xenos nicht ein paar Messer machen? Oder sollen wir ein paar hölzerne Adler an ihnen anbringen, damit Ihr ruhig schlafen könnt?"

languages.text: 「貴方様、自由に話してもよろしいでしょうか？形式を一切取らないで」{n}クラヴィッチは顔色が悪くなり、眉間に濃い血管が浮き上がる。{/n}「生き残るためには、我々の連隊は自らの死体からズボンを縫う。それがザルコフの現状だ。なぜ、我々はこれらの異星人を解体してナイフを作れないのか？それとも、貴方の心を安らかにするため、木製のアキラを彼らにつければいいのか？」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, permission to speak freely? Without any formalities?" {n}Kuravich goes pale, while a dark vein bulges on his brow.{/n} "To survive, our regiment has to stitch trousers out of our own dead. That's how things are on Zarkov! Why can't we scrap these xenos for some knives? Or should we attach some wooden Aquilas to them just to put your mind at ease?"

traits.locale_text: 「貴方様、自由に話してもよろしいでしょうか？形式を一切取らないで」{n}クラヴィッチは顔色が悪くなり、眉間に濃い血管が浮き上がる。{/n}「生き残るためには、我々の連隊は自らの死体からズボンを縫う。それがザルコフの現状だ。なぜ、我々はこれらの異星人を解体してナイフを作れないのか？それとも、貴方の心を安らかにするため、木製のアキラを彼らにつければいいのか？」
